name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Coolix
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends one or two 24-bit Coolix infrared remote codes to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: First
config_entries.description: The first 24-bit Coolix code to send; see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Second
config_entries.description: The second 24-bit Coolix code to send; see dumper output for more info.
